Friendly service (depending on the gas station attendant, by the way), and fast payment, at least when using the YPF app.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Fui el domingo a merendar con mí familia.despues fui al baño y entro una empleada de limpieza y me empezó a gritar y a insultarme. Me Decia que el baño estaba clausurado Con lo cual  le respondí que la puerta estaba abierta .me fui .la pasé muy mal .

(Translated by Google)
I went to have a snack with my family on Sunday. Afterwards, I went to the bathroom and a cleaning lady came in and started yelling and insulting me. She kept saying the bathroom was closed, to which I replied that the door was open. I left. I had a terrible time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2cmVEQmZREAE
